cd /root/Iryna_Karmazina
git pull --ff-only origin main >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
python3 - <<'PY'
import json,os,urllib.request,urllib.error
KEY=os.environ.get("N8N_API_KEY","")
BASE="https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1"
def req(method,path,body=None):
    data=json.dumps(body).encode() if body is not None else None
    r=urllib.request.Request(BASE+path,data=data,method=method,headers={"X-N8N-API-KEY":KEY,"Content-Type":"application/json"})
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(r,timeout=30) as x: return x.status,x.read().decode("utf-8","ignore")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e: return e.code,e.read().decode("utf-8","ignore")
    except Exception as e: return -1,str(e)
ST="n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote"
wid="WuYZdxfzaRp3ezcO"; fp="n8n_dz/dz_tracking_key.json"
st,body=req("GET","/workflows/"+wid)
cur=json.loads(body)
stickies=[n for n in json.load(open(fp,encoding="utf-8"))["nodes"] if n.get("type")==ST]
keep=[n for n in cur.get("nodes",[]) if n.get("type")!=ST]
payload={"name":cur.get("name"),"nodes":stickies+keep,"connections":cur.get("connections",{}),"settings":cur.get("settings") or {"executionOrder":"v1"}}
st2,resp=req("PUT","/workflows/"+wid,payload)
print("PUT",st2)
print("ERR_BODY:",resp[:500])
# also show sticky note names/ids to spot duplicate id/name issues
print("sticky ids:",[n.get("id") for n in stickies])
print("keep names sample:",[n.get("name") for n in keep][:3])
PY
